top_review.review_text: I have eaten at hundreds of restaurants in NYC. Ive walked past this place a hundred times. I ordered on a whim. This may be up there with the best food I’ve ever had in my life. The flavor was perfect. The food was cooked perfectly. The portion sizes were large. A real 10/10. I’m actually blown away with how excellent this place is. I’m excited to order from here again and frequently in the future. Outstanding.
